description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

Read-only public API for retrieving invoice, order, product, vendor, category, and restaurant-unit data from the MarginEdge restaurants you are authorized to access. The API supports one-way data retrieval only (MarginEdge to your application) and is included with any MarginEdge subscription. Authentication uses an API key sent in the x-api-key header. List responses are paged via an opaque nextPage cursor.

Contact Support:
 Name: MarginEdge Developer Support
